assertions.reason: generate_pairing_code emits exactly 6 lowercase alphanumeric chars; covered by Rust tests.
Pull path finds existing beacon gist by pairing code through gh gist list description matching.
Unknown code returns the user-friendly error "No beacon found for this code".
Missing gist scope is detected and the exact recovery command `gh auth refresh -s gist` is included.
Push creates a gist with description pattern vibogit-beacon-{code} when one does not already exist.
Pull discovers the gist by pairing code and parses machine data from beacon JSON.
Config now uses pairing-code field and tolerates missing legacy field during deserialization/normalization.
